raw_output:
The document is classified as a financial_statement.  Key signals driving this decision include:

• Presence of “Statement” terminology (e.g. “Fidelity Account Statement,” “Account Summary”).
• Tabular sections listing holdings, trades, cost basis, gain/loss—all hallmarks of a financial statement.
• Line items for “Market Value,” “Shares,” “Performance” and similar financial metrics.
• Publisher is a financial services firm (Fidelity), and the layout mirrors brokerage or investment statements rather than invoices, contracts, or generic forms.

These cues all point to a formal financial statement rather than an invoice, contract, or other document type.
